name: vibe_learn
description: Curriculum-driven software learning tutor. Builds your mental model — one concept at a time — with Socratic teaching, progress tracking, and structured session notes.
author: Pavan Kumar

steps: Copy vibe_learn.config.template.yaml to vibe_learn.config.yaml in your project root
Edit vibe_learn.config.yaml with your topic, curriculum paths, and preferred language/framework
Create your theory/ directory and copy starter JSON files from assets/starter/
Invoke /vibe_learn in Claude Code to begin
